Frequently Asked Questions
Q1. When did the UPESSC UP Principal 2026 Online Application Process Start?
The online application process started on 21 July 2026 .
Q2. What is the Exam Date for UPESSC UP Principal 2026 ?
The Examination will be conducted in 24/09/2026 .
Q3. Where can I find the syllabus for the UPESSC UP Principal 2026 Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete details.
Q4. How can I download the UPESSC UP Principal 2026 Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
Q5. What is the last date to apply online for UPESSC UP Principal 2026?
The last date to apply online is 20 August 2026..
Q6. What is the last date to pay the application fee?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 20 August 2026 .
Q7. How can I apply for UPESSC UP Principal 2026 Online form?
tables: Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission UPESSC Principal Recruitment 2026 : Apply Online for 111 Post

Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission UPESSC has released the notification for the recruitment of Principal Exam 2026. Those Candidates Are Interested to the Following UPESSC Principal Exam 2026 Vacancy Can Apply Online from 21/01/2026 to 20/08/2026. See the advertisement for information related to age limit, syllabus, Department wise post, selection procedure, pay scale in UPESSC Principal Advt No 02/2026 Recruitment 2026.
